customJs:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>📦 钢材管理系统 V8.2</title>
    <style>
        /* ===== 全局样式 ===== */
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        :root {
            --primary: #2563eb;
            --primary-light: #dbeafe;
            --primary-dark: #1d4ed8;
            --success: #16a34a;
            --success-light: #dcfce7;
            --warning: #f59e0b;
            --warning-light: #fef3c7;
            --danger: #ef4444;
            --danger-light: #fee2e2;
            --purple: #8b5cf6;
            --purple-light: #ede9fe;
            --gray-50: #f8fafc;
            --gray-100: #f1f5f9;
            --gray-200: #e2e8f0;
            --gray-300: #cbd5e1;
            --gray-400: #94a3b8;
            --gray-500: #64748b;
            --gray-600: #475569;
            --gray-700: #334155;
            --gray-800: #1e293b;
            --gray-900: #0f172a;
            --radius: 12px;
            --shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);
            --transition: 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
        }
        body {
            background: var(--gray-100);
            padding: 20px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            min-height: 100vh;
            font-family: "Inter", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif;
            color: var(--gray-800);
        }
        .app-wrapper {
            max-width: 1520px;
            width: 100%;
            background: #fff;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);
            padding: 24px 32px 36px;
        }
        /* ===== 登录 ===== */
        .login-overlay {
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.55);
            backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            z-index: 9999;
            padding: 20px;
            animation: fadeIn 0.35s ease;
        }
        .login-overlay.hidden {
            display: none;
        }
        @keyframes fadeIn {
            0% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: scale(0.96)
            }
            100% {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: scale(1)
            }
        }
        .login-card {
            background: #fff;
            border-radius: 24px;
            padding: 44px 40px 36px;
            width: 400px;
            max-width: 100%;
            box-shadow: 0 24px 64px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.20);
            text-align: center;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .login-card::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            height: 4px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--primary), var(--purple));
        }
        .login-card .logo {
            font-size: 48px;
            margin-bottom: 4px;
        }
        .login-card h2 {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--gray-900);
            margin-bottom: 4px;
        }
        .login-card .sub {
            color: var(--gray-500);
            font-size: 14px;
            margin-bottom: 28px;
        }
        .login-card .form-group {
            text-align: left;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        .login-card .form-group label {
            display: block;
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--gray-700);
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }
        .login-card .form-group input {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 10px 14px;
            border: 1px solid var(--gray-300);
            border-radius: 10px;
            font-size: 15px;
            background: var(--gray-50);
        }
        .login-card .form-group input:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: var(--primary);
            background: #fff;
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.12);
        }
        .login-card .btn-login {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 10px;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #fff;
            background: var(--primary);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: var(--transition);
            margin-top: 6px;
        }
        .login-card .btn-login:hover {
            background: var(--primary-dark);
            transform: translateY(-1px);
            box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.30);
        }
        .login-card .login-error {
            color: var(--danger);
            font-size: 14px;
            margin-top: 12px;
            min-height: 24px;
            font-weight: 500;
        }
        /* ===== 头部 ===== */
        .app-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding-bottom: 16px;
            border-bottom: 2px solid var(--gray-100);
        }
        .app-header h1 {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--gray-900);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
        }
        .app-header h1 small {
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 400;
            color: var(--gray-400);
        }
        .header-right {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        .user-badge {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            background: var(--gray-50);
            padding: 6px 16px 6px 14px;
            border-radius: 30px;
            border: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
            font-size: 13px;
            color: var(--gray-700);
        }
        .user-badge .role-tag {
            font-size: 11px;
            font-weight: 700;
            padding: 2px 10px;
            border-radius: 30px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
        }
        .role-tag.admin {
            background: var(--primary-light);
            color: var(--primary-dark);
        }
        .role-tag.employee {
            background: var(--gray-200);
            color: var(--gray-600);
        }
        .btn-logout {
            background: transparent;
            border: 1px solid var(--gray-300);
            padding: 6px 16px;
            border-radius: 30px;
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--gray-600);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: var(--transition);
        }
        .btn-logout:hover {
            background: var(--danger);
            color: #fff;
            border-color: var(--danger);
        }
        /* ===== 导航 ===== */
        .nav-tabs {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 2px;
            margin-bottom: 28px;
            padding-bottom: 2px;
            border-bottom: 2px solid var(--gray-200);
            overflow-x: auto;
        }
        .nav-tab {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--gray-500);
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            border-radius: var(--radius) var(--radius) 0 0;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: var(--transition);
            border-bottom: 3px solid transparent;
            white-space: nowrap;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
        }
        .nav-tab:hover:not(.hidden-tab) {
            color: var(--gray-800);
            background: var(--gray-50);
        }
        .nav-tab.active {
            color: var(--primary);
            border-bottom-color: var(--primary);
            background: var(--primary-light);
        }
        .nav-tab .badge {
            background: var(--gray-200);
            color: var(--gray-600);
            border-radius: 30px;
            padding: 0 10px;
            font-size: 11px;
            font-weight: 600;
            margin-left: 4px;
            min-width: 20px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .nav-tab.active .badge {
            background: var(--primary);
            color: #fff;
        }
        .nav-tab.hidden-tab {
            display: none !important;
        }
        /* ===== 页面容器 ===== */
        .page {
            display: none;
            animation: fadeUp 0.3s ease;
        }
        .page.active {
            display: block;
        }
        @keyframes fadeUp {
            0% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateY(12px)
            }
            100% {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translateY(0)
            }
        }
        /* ===== 通用组件 ===== */
        .param-box,
        .summary-filters {
            background: var(--gray-50);
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            padding: 16px 24px;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
            border: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 16px 28px;
        }
        .param-item {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            font-size: 14px;
            color: var(--gray-600);
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        .param-item strong {
            color: var(--gray-800);
            font-weight: 600;
        }
        .param-item .value {
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--primary);
            background: var(--primary-light);
            padding: 2px 16px;
            border-radius: 30px;
            font-size: 15px;
        }
        .param-item select,
        .param-item input[type="number"],
        .param-item input[type="date"],
        .param-item input[type="text"] {
            padding: 6px 12px;
            border: 1px solid var(--gray-300);
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-size: 14px;
            background: #fff;
        }
        .param-item select:focus,
        .param-item input:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: var(--primary);
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.12);
        }
        .param-item input[type="number"] {
            width: 90px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .param-item input[type="number"]:disabled {
            background: var(--gray-100);
            color: var(--gray-400);
        }
        .param-item .spec-hint {
            font-size: 13px;
            color: var(--gray-400);
            margin-left: 2px;
        }
        .param-item .unit-label {
            font-size: 13px;
            color: var(--gray-400);
        }
        .summary-filters .filter-item {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            font-size: 14px;
            color: var(--gray-600);
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        .summary-filters .filter-item input,
        .summary-filters .filter-item select {
            padding: 6px 10px;
            border: 1px solid var(--gray-300);
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-size: 13px;
            background: #fff;
        }
        .input-area {
            background: #fafcff;
            border: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            padding: 18px 22px;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
        }
        .input-row {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            align-items: flex-end;
            gap: 12px 16px;
        }
        .input-group {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 3px;
        }
        .input-group label {
            font-size: 11px;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--gray-600);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.2px;
        }
        .input-group input,
        .input-group select {
            padding: 8px 12px;
            border: 1px solid var(--gray-300);
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-size: 14px;
            background: #fff;
            width: 130px;
        }
        .input-group input:focus,
        .input-group select:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: var(--primary);
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.10);
        }
        .input-group input[type="number"] {
            width: 110px;
        }
        .input-group input:disabled {
            background: var(--gray-100);
            color: var(--gray-400);
        }
        .input-group .hint-zero {
            font-size: 10px;
            color: var(--gray-400);
            font-weight: 400;
        }
        .hint-text {
            font-size: 12px;
            color: var(--gray-400);
            margin-top: 10px;
            padding-top: 8px;
            border-top: 1px dashed var(--gray-200);
        }
        .btn {
            padding: 8px 22px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 600;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: var(--transition);
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            white-space: nowrap;
            background: var(--gray-200);
            color: var(--gray-700);
        }
        .btn:hover {
            transform: translateY(-1px);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow);
        }
        .btn-primary {
            background: var(--primary);
            color: #fff;
        }
        .btn-primary:hover {
            background: var(--primary-dark);
            box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.30);
        }
        .btn-success {
            background: var(--success);
            color: #fff;
        }
        .btn-success:hover {
            background: #15803d;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(22, 163, 74, 0.30);
        }
        .btn-danger {
            background: var(--danger);
            color: #fff;
        }
        .btn-danger:hover {
            background: #dc2626;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.30);
        }
        .btn-outline {
            background: transparent;
            border: 1px solid var(--gray-300);
            color: var(--gray-600);
        }
        .btn-outline:hover {
            background: var(--gray-50);
            border-color: var(--gray-400);
        }
        .btn-warning {
            background: var(--warning);
            color: #fff;
        }
        .btn-warning:hover {
            background: #d97706;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.30);
        }
        .btn-purple {
            background: var(--purple);
            color: #fff;
        }
        .btn-purple:hover {
            background: #7c3aed;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.30);
        }
        .btn-excel {
            background: #217346;
            color: #fff;
        }
        .btn-excel:hover {
            background: #1a5c38;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(33, 115, 70, 0.30);
        }
        .btn-sm {
            padding: 5px 14px;
            font-size: 12px;
        }
        .action-bar {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            margin-top: 0px;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        .action-bar .left {
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--gray-800);
            font-size: 15px;
        }
        .toolbar {
            display: flex;
            gap: 8px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        .table-wrap {
            overflow-x: auto;
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            border: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
            background: #fff;
        }
        table {
            width: 100%;
            border-collapse: collapse;
            font-size: 13px;
            min-width: 720px;
        }
        th {
            background: var(--gray-50);
            color: var(--gray-700);
            font-weight: 600;
            padding: 12px;
            text-align: center;
            border-bottom: 2px solid var(--gray-200);
            font-size: 12px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
        }
        td {
            padding: 10px 12px;
            text-align: center;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gray-100);
            vertical-align: middle;
            color: var(--gray-700);
        }
        tr:last-child td {
            border-bottom: none;
        }
        tr:hover td {
            background: var(--gray-50);
        }
        .empty-row td {
            padding: 40px 0;
            color: var(--gray-400);
            font-size: 14px;
            font-style: italic;
        }
        .col-qty {
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--primary-dark);
        }
        .col-spec {
            font-weight: 500;
            color: var(--gray-800);
        }
        .type-pickup {
            color: var(--danger);
            font-weight: 600;
        }
        .type-storage {
            color: var(--success);
            font-weight: 600;
        }
        .total-weight {
            margin-top: 12px;
            padding: 14px 24px;
            background: var(--gray-50);
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            border: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
            display: flex;
            justify-content: flex-end;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 20px;
            font-size: 15px;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--gray-800);
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        .total-weight .num-badge {
            background: var(--primary);
            color: #fff;
            padding: 4px 28px;
            border-radius: 30px;
            font-size: 20px;
            font-weight: 700;
        }
        .total-weight .num-badge.gray {
            background: var(--gray-600);
            font-size: 16px;
            padding: 4px 20px;
        }
        .summary-stats {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(150px, 1fr));
            gap: 14px;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
        }
        .summary-stats .stat-card {
            background: #fff;
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            padding: 16px 18px;
            text-align: center;
            border: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
            transition: var(--transition);
        }
        .summary-stats .stat-card:hover {
            border-color: var(--gray-300);
            transform: translateY(-2px);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow);
        }
        .summary-stats .stat-card .num {
            font-size: 28px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--gray-900);
            line-height: 1.2;
        }
        .summary-stats .stat-card .label {
            font-size: 12px;
            color: var(--gray-500);
            margin-top: 4px;
            font-weight: 500;
        }
        .summary-stats .stat-card.blue .num {
            color: var(--primary);
        }
        .summary-stats .stat-card.green .num {
            color: var(--success);
        }
        .summary-stats .stat-card.red .num {
            color: var(--danger);
        }
        .summary-stats .stat-card.purple .num {
            color: var(--purple);
        }
        .summary-stats .stat-card.orange .num {
            color: var(--warning);
        }
        .data-mgr-box {
            background: var(--gray-50);
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            padding: 20px 24px;
            border: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
            margin-bottom: 24px;
        }
        .data-mgr-box .title {
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 16px;
            color: var(--gray-900);
            margin-bottom: 14px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
        }
        .data-mgr-box .input-row {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            align-items: flex-end;
            gap: 12px 18px;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
        }
        .data-mgr-box .input-group input {
            width: 200px;
        }
        .data-mgr-box .list-box {
            max-height: 200px;
            overflow-y: auto;
            border: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
            border-radius: 8px;
            background: #fff;
        }
        .data-mgr-box .list-box table {
            min-width: auto;
            font-size: 13px;
        }
        .data-mgr-box .list-box th {
            background: var(--gray-50);
            padding: 8px 14px;
            font-size: 11px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
        }
        .data-mgr-box .list-box td {
            padding: 8px 14px;
            font-size: 13px;
        }
        .del-item {
            color: var(--danger);
            cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: 600;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            font-size: 13px;
            transition: var(--transition);
        }
        .del-item:hover {
            color: #dc2626;
            text-decoration: underline;
        }
        .add-material-form {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(200px, 1fr));
            gap: 16px 20px;
            background: var(--gray-50);
            padding: 20px 24px;
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            border: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
            margin-bottom: 24px;
        }
        .add-material-form .form-group {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 4px;
        }
        .add-material-form .form-group label {
            font-size: 12px;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--gray-600);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.2px;
        }
        .add-material-form .form-group input,
        .add-material-form .form-group select {
            padding: 8px 12px;
            border: 1px solid var(--gray-300);
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-size: 14px;
            background: #fff;
        }
        .add-material-form .form-actions {
            grid-column: 1 / -1;
            display: flex;
            gap: 12px;
            margin-top: 6px;
        }
        .material-list-box {
            border: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
            border-radius: 8px;
            overflow: hidden;
            max-height: 280px;
            overflow-y: auto;
        }
        .material-list-box table {
            min-width: auto;
            font-size: 13px;
        }
        .material-list-box th {
            background: var(--gray-50);
            padding: 8px 14px;
            font-size: 11px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
        }
        .material-list-box td {
            padding: 8px 14px;
            font-size: 13px;
        }
        .del-mat {
            color: var(--danger);
            cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: 600;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            font-size: 13px;
            transition: var(--transition);
        }
        .del-mat:hover {
            color: #dc2626;
            text-decoration: underline;
        }
        .data-center-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(260px, 1fr));
            gap: 20px;
            margin: 16px 0 20px;
        }
        .dc-card {
            background: #fff;
            border: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            padding: 20px 24px 24px;
            transition: var(--transition);
        }
        .dc-card:hover {
            border-color: var(--gray-300);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow);
        }
        .dc-card h3 {
            font-size: 17px;
            margin: 0 0 6px 0;
            color: var(--gray-900);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
        }
        .dc-card p {
            font-size: 14px;
            color: var(--gray-500);
            margin: 0 0 16px 0;
            line-height: 1.6;
        }
        .dc-card .btn-group {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 8px;
        }
        .dc-card .btn-group .btn {
            flex: 1 0 auto;
        }
        .dc-status {
            margin-top: 12px;
            padding: 14px 20px;
            background: var(--gray-50);
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            border: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
            font-size: 14px;
            color: var(--gray-600);
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 10px;
        }
        .dc-status .stat-item {
            display: flex;
            align-items: baseline;
            gap: 6px;
        }
        .dc-status .stat-item .num {
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--gray-900);
        }
        .dc-import-area {
            margin-top: 12px;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            background: var(--warning-light);
            border: 1px dashed var(--warning);
            border-radius: 8px;
            display: none;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 14px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        .dc-import-area.show {
            display: flex;
        }
        #dcMessage {
            margin-top: 12px;
            padding: 12px 18px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 500;
            display: none;
        }
        #dcMessage.show {
            display: block;
        }
        #dcMessage.success {
            background: var(--success-light);
            color: #166534;
            border-left: 4px solid var(--success);
        }
        #dcMessage.error {
            background: var(--danger-light);
            color: #991b1b;
            border-left: 4px solid var(--danger);
        }
        #dcMessage.info {
            background: var(--primary-light);
            color: #1e40af;
            border-left: 4px solid var(--primary);
        }
        .label-print-container {
            display: none;
            padding: 10px;
        }
        .label-item {
            display: inline-block;
            width: 40mm;
            height: 60mm;
            border: 1px solid #ccc;
            margin: 2mm;
            padding: 3mm 2mm;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            font-size: 8pt;
            text-align: center;
            vertical-align: top;
            page-break-inside: avoid;
            background: #fff;
        }
        .label-item .label-title {
            font-size: 9pt;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--gray-900);
            margin-bottom: 1mm;
        }
        .label-item .label-row {
            font-size: 7.5pt;
            line-height: 1.6;
            color: var(--gray-700);
        }
        .label-item .label-row .label-key {
            color: var(--gray-400);
            font-weight: 400;
        }
        .label-item .label-row .label-value {
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--gray-900);
        }
        .label-item .label-spec {
            font-size: 9pt;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--primary);
        }
        .label-item .label-size {
            font-size: 8.5pt;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--gray-900);
        }
        .label-item .label-type {
            font-size: 7pt;
            font-weight: 500;
            color: var(--gray-500);
            background: var(--gray-100);
            padding: 0 6px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            display: inline-block;
        }
        .label-item .label-footer {
            font-size: 5.5pt;
            color: var(--gray-400);
            margin-top: 1mm;
            border-top: 1px dashed var(--gray-200);
            padding-top: 1mm;
        }
        .user-mgr-box {
            margin-top: 16px;
            padding: 16px 20px;
            background: #fff;
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            border: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
        }
        .user-mgr-box .title {
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 15px;
            color: var(--gray-800);
            margin-bottom: 12px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
        }
        .user-mgr-box .user-row {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px 16px;
            padding: 8px 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gray-100);
        }
        .user-mgr-box .user-row:last-child {
            border-bottom: none;
        }
        .user-mgr-box .user-row .uname {
            font-weight: 600;
            min-width: 100px;
        }
        .user-mgr-box .user-row .urole {
            font-size: 12px;
            font-weight: 600;
            padding: 2px 12px;
            border-radius: 30px;
        }
        .user-mgr-box .user-row .urole.admin {
            background: var(--primary-light);
            color: var(--primary-dark);
        }
        .user-mgr-box .user-row .urole.employee {
            background: var(--gray-200);
            color: var(--gray-600);
        }
        .user-mgr-box .add-user-form {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            align-items: flex-end;
            gap: 10px 14px;
            padding: 12px 0 4px;
            border-top: 1px dashed var(--gray-200);
            margin-top: 8px;
        }
        .user-mgr-box .add-user-form .input-group {
            flex: 1 0 120px;
        }
        .user-mgr-box .add-user-form .input-group input,
        .user-mgr-box .add-user-form .input-group select {
            width: 100%;
            min-width: 100px;
        }

        /* ===== 财务统计专用 ===== */
        .finance-stats {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr));
            gap: 14px;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
        }
        .finance-stats .stat-card {
            background: #fff;
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            padding: 16px 18px;
            text-align: center;
            border: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
            transition: var(--transition);
        }
        .finance-stats .stat-card:hover {
            border-color: var(--gray-300);
            transform: translateY(-2px);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow);
        }
        .finance-stats .stat-card .num {
            font-size: 28px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--gray-900);
            line-height: 1.2;
        }
        .finance-stats .stat-card .label {
            font-size: 12px;
            color: var(--gray-500);
            margin-top: 4px;
            font-weight: 500;
        }
        .finance-stats .stat-card.blue .num {
            color: var(--primary);
        }
        .finance-stats .stat-card.green .num {
            color: var(--success);
        }
        .finance-stats .stat-card.red .num {
            color: var(--danger);
        }
        .finance-stats .stat-card.purple .num {
            color: var(--purple);
        }
        .finance-stats .stat-card.orange .num {
            color: var(--warning);
        }

        /* ===== 折叠面板样式 ===== */
        .detail-collapse {
            margin-top: 12px;
            border: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            background: #fff;
            overflow: hidden;
            transition: var(--transition);
        }
        .detail-collapse summary {
            padding: 14px 22px;
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 15px;
            color: var(--gray-800);
            cursor: pointer;
            background: var(--gray-50);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            user-select: none;
            transition: var(--transition);
            list-style: none;
        }
        .detail-collapse summary::-webkit-details-marker {
            display: none;
        }
        .detail-collapse summary::before {
            content: '▶';
            font-size: 12px;
            transition: transform 0.25s ease;
            color: var(--gray-400);
        }
        .detail-collapse[open] summary::before {
            transform: rotate(90deg);
        }
        .detail-collapse summary:hover {
            background: var(--gray-100);
        }
        .detail-collapse .badge-count {
            background: var(--primary);
            color: #fff;
            border-radius: 30px;
            padding: 0 14px;
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 700;
            line-height: 26px;
            min-width: 30px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .detail-collapse .badge-count.zero {
            background: var(--gray-300);
            color: var(--gray-600);
        }
        .detail-collapse .collapse-body {
            padding: 0;
            background: #fff;
        }
        .detail-collapse .collapse-body .table-wrap {
            border: none;
            border-radius: 0;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
        }
        .detail-collapse .collapse-body .total-weight {
            margin-top: 0;
            border-radius: 0;
            border-left: none;
            border-right: none;
            border-bottom: none;
        }

        /* ===== 备注筛选 ===== */
        .filter-remark-input {
            width: 160px !important;
        }

        /* ===== 打印 ===== */
        @media print {
            .no-print {
                display: none !important
            }
            .login-overlay {
                display: none !important
            }
            .nav-tabs {
                display: none !important
            }
            .input-area {
                display: none !important
            }
            .action-bar .toolbar {
                display: none !important
            }
            .btn {
                display: none !important
            }
            .user-mgr-box {
                display: none !important
            }
            .data-center-grid {
                display: none !important
            }
            .dc-status {
                display: none !important
            }
            .label-print-container {
                display: block !important
            }
            .summary-filters .filter-item .btn {
                display: none !important
            }
            .finance-stats {
                display: none !important
            }
            .param-box {
                display: none !important
            }
            .detail-collapse summary {
                display: none !important
            }
            .detail-collapse .collapse-body {
                display: block !important
            }
            .detail-collapse {
                border: none !important
            }
            .detail-collapse .collapse-body .table-wrap {
                border: 1px solid #ccc !important
            }
            .total-weight {
                display: flex !important
            }
        }

        /* ===== 响应式 ===== */
        @media (max-width:768px) {
            .app-wrapper {
                padding: 16px 14px
            }
            .login-card {
                padding: 32px 24px;
                width: 100%;
                max-width: 380px
            }
            .nav-tab {
                padding: 8px 14px;
                font-size: 13px
            }
            .add-material-form {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr
            }
            .summary-stats {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr
            }
            .data-center-grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr
            }
            .input-group input,
            .input-group select {
                width: 100px;
                font-size: 13px
            }
            .input-group input[type="number"] {
                width: 80px
            }
            .action-bar {
                flex-direction: column;
                align-items: stretch
            }
            .dc-status {
                flex-direction: column
            }
            .finance-stats {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr
            }
            .detail-collapse summary {
                font-size: 14px;
                padding: 12px 16px;
            }
        }
        @media (max-width:480px) {
            .add-material-form {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr
            }
            .summary-stats {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
                gap: 8px
            }
            .summary-stats .stat-card {
                padding: 12px 10px
            }
            .summary-stats .stat-card .num {
                font-size: 22px
            }
            .nav-tab {
                padding: 6px 10px;
                font-size: 12px
            }
            .login-card h2 {
                font-size: 20px
            }
            .finance-stats {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
                gap: 8px
            }
            .finance-stats .stat-card {
                padding: 12px 10px
            }
            .finance-stats .stat-card .num {
                font-size: 22px
            }
            .detail-collapse summary {
                font-size: 13px;
                padding: 10px 12px;
            }
            .filter-remark-input {
                width: 120px !important;
            }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <!-- ===== 登录覆盖层 ===== -->
    <div class="login-overlay" id="loginOverlay">
        <div class="login-card">
            <div class="logo">🔐</div>
            <h2>钢材管理系统</h2>
            <p class="sub">请输入您的账号和密码</p>
            <div class="form-group"><label>用户名</label><input type="text" id="loginUsername" value="admin"></div>
            <div class="form-group"><label>密码</label><input type="password" id="loginPassword" value="admin123"></div>
            <button class="btn-login" id="loginBtn">登 录</button>
            <div class="login-error" id="loginError"></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ===== 主应用 ===== -->
    <div class="app-wrapper" id="app" style="display:none;">
        <!-- 头部 -->
        <div class="app-header">
            <div class="header-left"><h1>📦 钢材管理系统 <small>V8.2 · 领料 · 入库 · 财务</small></h1></div>
            <div class="header-right no-print">
                <div class="user-badge"><span>👤 <span id="headerUsername">admin</span></span><span class="role-tag admin" id="headerRoleTag">管理员</span></div>
                <button class="btn-logout" id="logoutBtn">🚪 登出</button>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- 导航 -->
        <div class="nav-tabs no-print">
            <button class="nav-tab active" data-page="page-pickup">📋 领料单 <span class="badge" id="pickupCount">0</span></button>
            <button class="nav-tab" data-page="page-storage">📥 入库单 <span class="badge" id="storageCount">0</span></button>
            <button class="nav-tab" data-page="page-detail">📋 进出库详情</button>
            <button class="nav-tab" data-page="page-finance">💰 财务统计</button>
            <button class="nav-tab" data-page="page-inventory">📊 即时库存</button>
            <button class="nav-tab admin-only" data-page="page-projects">📁 项目管理</button>
            <button class="nav-tab admin-only" data-page="page-persons">👤 领料人管理</button>
            <button class="nav-tab admin-only" data-page="page-add-material">➕ 新增物料</button>
            <button class="nav-tab admin-only" data-page="page-datacenter">💾 数据中心</button>
        </div>

        <!-- ===== 页面：领料单 ===== -->
        <div class="page active" id="page-pickup">
            <div class="param-box">
                <div class="param-item"><strong>物料品类</strong><select id="pickupMaterialSelect" style="min-width:240px;"></select><span class="spec-hint" id="pickupSpecDisplay"></span></div>
                <div class="param-item"><strong>厚度 (mm)</strong><input type="number" id="pickupThickness" value="3" min="0.1" step="0.1"><span class="unit-label" id="pickupThicknessUnit">(板材用)</span></div>
                <div class="param-item"><strong id="pickupWeightLabel">每㎡重量</strong><span class="value" id="pickupWeightPerUnit">23.55</span><span id="pickupWeightUnit">KG</span></div>
                <div class="param-item"><strong>领料日期</strong><input type="date" id="pickupDate"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="input-area">
                <div class="input-row">
                    <div class="input-group"><label>物料名称</label><input type="text" id="pickupNameInput" placeholder="自动填充" style="width:150px;"></div>
                    <div class="input-group"><label>规格</label><input type="text" id="pickupSpecInput" placeholder="自动填充" style="width:120px;"></div>
                    <div class="input-group"><label>项目</label><select id="pickupProject" style="width:120px;"><option value="">-- 选择 --</option></select></div>
                    <div class="input-group"><label>领料人</label><select id="pickupPerson" style="width:120px;"><option value="">-- 选择 --</option></select></div>
                    <div class="input-group"><label>数量 <span class="hint-zero">（张/根）</span></label><input type="number" id="pickupQty" placeholder="如 5" min="1" step="1" value="1"></div>
                    <div class="input-group" id="pickupStockGroup"><label>在库尺寸</label><select id="pickupStockSize" style="width:150px;"><option value="">-- 选择库存 --</option></select></div>
                    <div class="input-group"><label>领料长度 (mm)</label><input type="number" id="pickupRealLen" placeholder="如 2000" min="1" step="1"></div>
                    <div class="input-group"><label id="pickupWidthLabel">领料宽度 (mm)</label><input type="number" id="pickupRealWid" placeholder="如 1500" min="1" step="1"></div>
                    <div class="input-group"><label>退库长度 (mm) <span class="hint-zero">（可为0）</span></label><input type="number" id="pickupRetLen" placeholder="0" min="0" step="1" value="0"></div>
                    <div class="input-group"><label id="pickupRetWidLabel">退库宽度 (mm) <span class="hint-zero">（可为0）</span></label><input type="number" id="pickupRetWid" placeholder="0" min="0" step="1" value="0"></div>
                    <div class="input-group" style="justify-content:flex-end;"><button class="btn btn-primary" id="pickupAddBtn">➕ 添加领料</button></div>
                </div>
                <div class="hint-text" id="pickupHint">⚡ 板材：长×宽算面积；型材：宽度自动1000mm | 退库将自动生成入库单（备注：生产退库）</div>
            </div>

            <details class="detail-collapse" id="pickupCollapse" open>
                <summary>
                    <span>📋 领料明细</span>
                    <span class="badge-count" id="pickupCollapseBadge">0</span>
                    <span style="flex:1;"></span>
                    <span style="font-weight:400;font-size:13px;color:var(--gray-400);">点击展开/收起</span>
                </summary>
                <div class="collapse-body">
                    <div class="action-bar"><div class="left"></div><div class="toolbar no-print"><button class="btn btn-success" id="pickupPrintBtn">🖨️ 打印</button><button class="btn btn-excel" id="pickupExcelBtn">📊 导出Excel</button><button class="btn btn-outline btn-sm admin-only" id="pickupClearBtn">🗑️ 清空全部</button></div></div>
                    <div class="table-wrap"><table><thead><tr><th>领料日期</th><th>项目</th><th>领料人</th><th>物料名称</th><th class="col-spec">规格</th><th class="col-qty">数量</th><th>领料长</th><th>领料宽</th><th>退库长</th><th>退库宽</th><th>项目用料面积(㎡)</th><th>领料重量(KG)</th><th>项目用料重量(KG)</th><th>产线退库重量(KG)</th><th class="no-print">操作</th></tr></thead><tbody id="pickupTableBody"><tr class="empty-row"><td colspan="15">暂无领料明细</td></tr></tbody></table></div>
                    <div class="total-weight">领料合计总重量：<span class="num-badge" id="pickupTotalWeight">0.00</span> KG  |  总数量：<span class="num-badge gray" id="pickupTotalQty">0</span> 件</div>
                </div>
            </details>
        </div>

        <!-- ===== 页面：入库单 ===== -->
        <div class="page" id="page-storage">
            <div class="param-box">
                <div class="param-item"><strong>物料品类</strong><select id="storageMaterialSelect" style="min-width:240px;"></select><span class="spec-hint" id="storageSpecDisplay"></span></div>
                <div class="param-item"><strong>厚度 (mm)</strong><input type="number" id="storageThickness" value="3" min="0.1" step="0.1"><span class="unit-label" id="storageThicknessUnit">(板材用)</span></div>
                <div class="param-item"><strong id="storageWeightLabel">每㎡重量</strong><span class="value" id="storageWeightPerUnit">23.55</span><span id="storageWeightUnit">KG</span></div>
                <div class="param-item"><strong>入库日期</strong><input type="date" id="storageDate"></div>
                <div class="param-item"><strong>🔍 备注筛选</strong><input type="text" id="storageRemarkFilter" placeholder="输入备注关键词" class="filter-remark-input" style="width:160px;"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="input-area">
                <div class="input-row">
                    <div class="input-group"><label>物料名称</label><input type="text" id="storageNameInput" placeholder="自动填充" style="width:150px;"></div>
                    <div class="input-group"><label>规格</label><input type="text" id="storageSpecInput" placeholder="自动填充" style="width:120px;"></div>
                    <div class="input-group"><label>数量 <span class="hint-zero">（张/根）</span></label><input type="number" id="storageQty" placeholder="如 5" min="1" step="1" value="1"></div>
                    <div class="input-group"><label>长度 (mm)</label><input type="number" id="storageLen" placeholder="如 2000" min="1" step="1"></div>
                    <div class="input-group" id="storageWidthGroup"><label id="storageWidthLabel">宽度 (mm)</label><input type="number" id="storageWid" placeholder="如 1500" min="1" step="1"></div>
                    <div class="input-group"><label>备注</label><input type="text" id="storageRemark" placeholder="如：采购入库" style="width:130px;"></div>
                    <div class="input-group" style="justify-content:flex-end;"><button class="btn btn-success" id="storageAddBtn">📥 添加入库</button></div>
                </div>
                <div class="hint-text" id="storageHint">⚡ 板材：长×宽算面积；型材：宽度可空（按1米计算）</div>
            </div>

            <details class="detail-collapse" id="storageCollapse" open>
                <summary>
                    <span>📥 入库明细</span>
                    <span class="badge-count" id="storageCollapseBadge">0</span>
                    <span style="flex:1;"></span>
                    <span style="font-weight:400;font-size:13px;color:var(--gray-400);">点击展开/收起</span>
                </summary>
                <div class="collapse-body">
                    <div class="action-bar"><div class="left"></div><div class="toolbar no-print"><button class="btn btn-success" id="storagePrintBtn">🖨️ 打印</button><button class="btn btn-excel" id="storageExcelBtn">📊 导出Excel</button><button class="btn btn-outline btn-sm admin-only" id="storageClearBtn">🗑️ 清空全部</button></div></div>
                    <div class="table-wrap"><table><thead><tr><th>入库日期</th><th>物料名称</th><th class="col-spec">规格</th><th>厚度 (mm)</th><th>单位重量 (KG)</th><th class="col-qty">数量</th><th>长度</th><th>宽度</th><th>单件面积(㎡)</th><th>总重量(KG)</th><th>备注</th><th class="no-print">操作</th></tr></thead><tbody id="storageTableBody"><tr class="empty-row"><td colspan="12">暂无入库明细</td></tr></tbody></table></div>
                    <div class="total-weight">入库合计总重量：<span class="num-badge" id="storageTotalWeight">0.00</span> KG  |  总数量：<span class="num-badge gray" id="storageTotalQty">0</span> 件</div>
                </div>
            </details>
        </div>

        <!-- ===== 页面：进出库详情 ===== -->
        <div class="page" id="page-detail">
            <div class="summary-filters">
                <div class="filter-item"><label>从</label><input type="date" id="detailFromDate"><label>至</label><input type="date" id="detailToDate"></div>

            projects: 'matMgr_projects',
            persons: 'matMgr_persons',
            lastBackup: 'matMgr_lastBackup',
            users: 'matMgr_users',
            session: 'matMgr_session',
        };
        const DEFAULT_USERS = [
            { username: 'admin', password: 'admin123', role: 'admin' },
            { username: 'user', password: 'user123', role: 'employee' }
        ];
        const Auth = {
            getUsers() {
                const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.users);
                if (raw) { try { return JSON.parse(raw); } catch (e) {} }
                localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEYS.users, JSON.stringify(DEFAULT_USERS));
                return DEFAULT_USERS.slice();
            },
            saveUsers(u) { localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEYS.users, JSON.stringify(u)); },
            getSession() {
                const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.session);
                if (raw) { try { return JSON.parse(raw); } catch (e) {} }
                return null;
            },
            setSession(u) { if (u) localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEYS.session, JSON.stringify(u)); else localStorage.removeItem(
                    STORAGE_KEYS.session); },
            login(username, password) {
                const users = this.getUsers();
                const found = users.find(u => u.username === username && u.password === password);
                if (found) { this.setSession({ username: found.username, role: found.role }); return found; }
                return null;
            },
            logout() { this.setSession(null); },
            getCurrentUser() { return this.getSession(); },
            isAdmin() { const u = this.getSession(); return u && u.role === 'admin'; },
            addUser(username, password, role) {
                const users = this.getUsers();
                if (users.find(u => u.username === username)) return false;
                users.push({ username, password, role });
                this.saveUsers(users);
                return true;
            },
            deleteUser(username) {
                const users = this.getUsers();
                const current = this.getCurrentUser();
                if (username === current.username) return false;
                const filtered = users.filter(u => u.username !== username);
                if (filtered.length === users.length) return false;
                if (!filtered.some(u => u.role === 'admin')) return false;
                this.saveUsers(filtered);
                return true;
            }
        };

            getStorages() {
                const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.storages);
                if (raw) { try { return JSON.parse(raw); } catch (e) {} }
                return [];
            },
            saveStorages(s) { localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEYS.storages, JSON.stringify(s)); },
            getProjects() {
                const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.projects);
                if (raw) { try { return JSON.parse(raw); } catch (e) {} }
                return [];
            },
            saveProjects(p) { localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEYS.projects, JSON.stringify(p)); },
            getPersons() {
                const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.persons);
                if (raw) { try { return JSON.parse(raw); } catch (e) {} }
                return [];
            },
            savePersons(p) { localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEYS.persons, JSON.stringify(p)); },
            getLastBackup() { return localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.lastBackup) || null; },
            setLastBackup(d) { localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEYS.lastBackup, d); },
            exportAll() {
                return {
                    version: '8.2',
                    exportedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
                    materials: this.getMaterials(),
                    pickups: this.getPickups(),
                    storages: this.getStorages(),
                    projects: this.getProjects(),
                    persons: this.getPersons(),
                };
            },
            importAll(data) {
                if (!data || typeof data !== 'object') throw new Error('无效数据格式');
                if (!Array.isArray(data.materials) || !Array.isArray(data.pickups) || !Array.isArray(data.storages) ||
                    !Array.isArray(data.projects) || !Array.isArray(data.persons)) throw new Error('数据不完整');
                this.saveMaterials(data.materials);
                this.savePickups(data.pickups);
                this.saveStorages(data.storages);
                this.saveProjects(data.projects);
                this.savePersons(data.persons);
                this.setLastBackup(data.exportedAt || new Date().toISOString());
            },
            resetToDefault() {
                this.saveMaterials(DEFAULT_MATERIALS.slice());
                this.savePickups([]);
                this.saveStorages([]);
                this.saveProjects([]);
                this.savePersons([]);
                this.setLastBackup(null);
            },
            clearRecords() { this.savePickups([]);
                this.saveStorages([]); },
            fixMaterialThickness() {
                const mats = this.getMaterials();
                let changed = false;
                mats.forEach(m => {
                    if (m.type === 'plate' && (m.thickness === undefined || m.thickness === null || m.thickness <=
                            0)) {
                        const extracted = extractNumberFromSpec(m.spec);
                        if (extracted !== null && extracted > 0) {
                            m.thickness = extracted;
                            changed = true;
                        }
                    }
                });
                if (changed) { this.saveMaterials(mats);
                    console.log('🔧 已修复部分板材的厚度'); }
            },
            fixInitialStorageDate() {
                const storages = this.getStorages();
                let changed = false;
                storages.forEach(s => {
                    if (s.remark === '6月期初' && s.date === '2026-06-26') {
                        s.date = '2026-05-31';
                        changed = true;
                    }
                });
                if (changed) {
                    this.saveStorages(storages);
                    console.log('✅ 已将6月期初入库日期从2026-06-26修正为2026-05-31');
                }
            },
            initDefaultStorages() {
                const existing = this.getStorages();
                if (existing.length === 0) {
                    const mats = this.getMaterials();
                    const mat1 = mats.find(m => m.code === '15.01.01.003');
                    const mat2 = mats.find(m => m.code === '15.01.02.001');
                    const defaultStorages = [];
                    if (mat1) {
                        const len = 2000,
                            wid = 1500,
                            qty = 10;
                        const area = (len * wid) / 1000000;
                        const unitWeight = mat1.thickness * mat1.density;
                        const weight = area * unitWeight * qty;
                        defaultStorages.push({
                            date: '2026-05-31',
                            materialName: mat1.name,
                            spec: mat1.spec,
                            qty: qty,
                            len: len,
                            wid: wid,
                            singleArea: area,
                            weight: weight,
                            unitWeight: unitWeight,
                            remark: '6月期初',
                            matCode: mat1.code,
                            type: 'plate',
                            thickness: mat1.thickness
                        });
                    }
                    if (mat2) {
                        const len = 6000,
                            wid = 1000,
                            qty = 5;
                        const lenM = len / 1000;
                        const area = lenM;
                        const unitWeight = mat2.perMeterWeight;
                        const weight = area * unitWeight * qty;
                        defaultStorages.push({
                            date: '2026-05-31',
                            materialName: mat2.name,
                            spec: mat2.spec,
                            qty: qty,
                            len: len,
                            wid: wid,
                            singleArea: area,
                            weight: weight,
                            unitWeight: unitWeight,
                            remark: '6月期初',
                            matCode: mat2.code,
                            type: 'profile',
                            thickness: '-'
                        });
                    }
                    if (defaultStorages.length > 0) {
                        this.saveStorages(defaultStorages);
                        console.log('✅ 已创建默认“6月期初”入库记录');
                    }
                }
            }
        };

        // ================================================================
        // 工具函数
        // ================================================================
        function fmtNum(v, d = 2) { return Number(v).toFixed(d); }

        function parseNum(v) { const n = parseFloat(v); return isNaN(n) ? 0 : n; }

        function getToday() {
            const d = new Date();
            return d.getFullYear() + '-' + String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0') + '-' + String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,
                '0');
        }

        function getNowStr() {
            const d = new Date();
            return d.getFullYear() + '-' + String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0') + '-' + String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,
                    '0') +
                ' ' + String(d.getHours()).padStart(2, '0') + ':' + String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
        }

        function formatDateISO(iso) {
            if (!iso) return '未备份';
            try { return new Date(iso).toLocaleString('zh-CN', { hour12: false }); } catch (e) { return iso; }
        }

        function exportToExcel(data, filename, headers, columnKeys) {
            let csv = '\uFEFF' + headers.join(',') + '\n';
            data.forEach(row => {
                csv += columnKeys.map(k => {
                    let v = row[k] !== undefined ? row[k] : '';
                    if (typeof v === 'string' && v.includes(',')) v = '"' + v + '"';
                    return v;
                }).join(',') + '\n';
            });
            const blob = new Blob([csv], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8;' });
            const link = document.createElement('a');
            link.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
            link.download = filename + '.csv';
            document.body.appendChild(link);
            link.click();
            document.body.removeChild(link);
            URL.revokeObjectURL(link.href);
        }

        function extractNumberFromSpec(spec) {
            if (!spec) return null;
            const match = spec.match(/(\d+\.?\d*)/);
            if (match) { return parseFloat(match[1]); }
            return null;
        }

            date: document.getElementById('pickupDate'),
            nameInput: document.getElementById('pickupNameInput'),

            projectSelect: document.getElementById('pickupProject'),
            personSelect: document.getElementById('pickupPerson'),
