        function getPickupMaterial() {
            const idx = parseInt(pickup.matSelect.value, 10);
            const mats = DataStore.getMaterials();
            return mats[idx] || null;
        }

        function updatePickupStockSizes() {
            const mat = getPickupMaterial(),
                sel = pickup.stockSize;
            sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- 选择库存 --</option>';
            if (!mat || mat.type !== 'plate') { sel.disabled = true; return; }
            sel.disabled = false;
            const all = [];
            DataStore.getStorages().forEach(r => {
                if (r.matCode === mat.code && r.type === 'plate') {
                    all.push({ type: 'storage', len: r.len, wid: r.wid, weight: r.weight });
                }
            });
            DataStore.getPickups().forEach(r => {
                if (r.matCode === mat.code && r.type === 'plate') {
                    all.push({ type: 'pickup', len: r.realL, wid: r.realW, weight: r.weight });
                }
                if (r.matCode === mat.code && r.type === 'plate' && r.retL > 0 && r.retW > 0 && r.returnWeight > 0) {
                    all.push({ type: 'return', len: r.retL, wid: r.retW, weight: r.returnWeight });
                }
            });
            const map = new Map();
            all.forEach(item => {
                const key = item.len + '|' + item.wid;
                if (!map.has(key)) map.set(key, { len: item.len, wid: item.wid, balance: 0 });
                const e = map.get(key);
                if (item.type === 'storage' || item.type === 'return') e.balance += item.weight;
                else if (item.type === 'pickup') e.balance -= item.weight;
            });
            const options = [];
            map.forEach((v) => { if (v.balance > 0.001) options.push(v); });
            if (!options.length) { sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- 无库存 --</option>'; return; }
            options.sort((a, b) => a.len - b.len || a.wid - b.wid);
            options.forEach(o => {
                const opt = document.createElement('option');
                opt.value = o.len + '|' + o.wid;
                opt.textContent = o.len + '×' + o.wid + ' (结余' + fmtNum(o.balance, 1) + 'KG)';
                sel.appendChild(opt);
            });
            if (options[0]) {
                sel.value = options[0].len + '|' + options[0].wid;
                pickup.realLen.value = options[0].len;
                pickup.realWid.value = options[0].wid;
            }
        }

        function updatePickupParams() {
            const mat = getPickupMaterial();
            if (!mat) return;
            pickup.specDisplay.textContent = mat.spec ? '[' + mat.spec + ']' : '';
            pickup.nameInput.value = mat.name || '';
            pickup.specInput.value = mat.spec || '';
            if (mat.type === 'plate') {
                pickup.thickness.disabled = false;
                pickup.thicknessUnit.textContent = '(板材用)';
                let thickVal = mat.thickness;
                if (thickVal === undefined || thickVal === null || thickVal <= 0) {
                    const extracted = extractNumberFromSpec(mat.spec);
                    if (extracted !== null && extracted > 0) thickVal = extracted;
                }
                pickup.thickness.value = (thickVal !== undefined && thickVal !== null && thickVal > 0) ? thickVal : '';
                pickup.weightLabel.textContent = '每㎡重量';
                pickup.weightUnit.textContent = 'KG';
                pickup.hint.textContent = '⚡ 板材：长×宽算面积 | 退库将自动生成入库单（备注：生产退库）';
                pickup.widthLabel.textContent = '领料宽度 (mm)';
                pickup.retWidLabel.textContent = '退库宽度 (mm)';
                pickup.realWid.disabled = false;
                pickup.retWid.disabled = false;
                if (pickup.realWid.value === '1000' && !pickup.realWid.dataset.userChanged) pickup.realWid.value = '';
                if (pickup.retWid.value === '1000' && !pickup.retWid.dataset.userChanged) pickup.retWid.value = '0';
                pickup.stockSize.style.display = 'inline-block';
                document.getElementById('pickupStockGroup').style.display = 'flex';
                updatePickupStockSizes();
            } else {
                pickup.thickness.disabled = true;
                pickup.thicknessUnit.textContent = '(型材禁用)';
                pickup.thickness.value = '';
                pickup.weightLabel.textContent = '每米重量';
                pickup.weightUnit.textContent = 'KG';
                pickup.hint.textContent = '⚡ 型材：宽度自动1000mm，长度按米计 | 退库将自动生成入库单（备注：生产退库）';
                pickup.widthLabel.textContent = '领料宽度 (mm)';
                pickup.retWidLabel.textContent = '退库宽度 (mm)';
                pickup.realWid.value = '1000';
                pickup.realWid.disabled = true;
                pickup.retWid.value = '1000';
                pickup.retWid.disabled = true;
                pickup.realWid.dataset.userChanged = 'false';
                pickup.retWid.dataset.userChanged = 'false';
                pickup.stockSize.style.display = 'none';
                document.getElementById('pickupStockGroup').style.display = 'none';
            }
            const thick = parseNum(pickup.thickness.value);
            pickup.weightPerUnit.textContent = fmtNum(mat.type === 'plate' ? thick * mat.density : (mat.perMeterWeight ||
                0), 2);
            renderPickupTable();
        }

        function renderPickupTable() {
            const rows = DataStore.getPickups(),
                dateVal = pickup.date.value || getToday();
            const count = rows.length;
            pickup.collapseBadge.textContent = count;
            pickup.collapseBadge.className = 'badge-count' + (count === 0 ? ' zero' : '');
            if (!rows.length) {
                pickup.tbody.innerHTML = '<tr class="empty-row"><td colspan="15">暂无领料明细</td></tr>';
                pickup.totalSpan.textContent = '0.00';
                pickup.totalQtySpan.textContent = '0';
                pickup.countBadge.textContent = '0';
                return;
            }
            let html = '',
                total = 0,
                totalQty = 0;
            const isAdmin = Auth.isAdmin();
            rows.forEach((r, i) => {
                total += r.weight || 0;
                totalQty += r.qty || 1;
                let grossWeight = 0;
                if (r.type === 'plate') {
                    const area = (r.realL * r.realW) / 1000000;
                    grossWeight = area * r.unitWeight * r.qty;
                } else {
                    const lenM = r.realL / 1000;
                    grossWeight = lenM * r.unitWeight * r.qty;
                }
                html += `<tr><td>${r.date||dateVal}</td><td>${r.project||''}</td><td>${r.person||''}</td>
                    <td>${r.materialName||''}</td><td class="col-spec">${r.spec||''}</td>
                    <td class="col-qty">${r.qty||1}</td><td>${r.realL||0}</td><td>${r.realW||0}</td>
                    <td>${r.retL||0}</td><td>${r.retW||0}</td>
                    <td>${fmtNum(r.singleArea||0,3)}</td>
                    <td>${fmtNum(grossWeight,2)}</td>
                    <td>${fmtNum(r.weight||0,2)}</td>
                    <td>${fmtNum(r.returnWeight||0,2)}</td>
                    <td class="no-print">${isAdmin ? `<button class="btn btn-danger btn-sm" data-idx="${i}" data-type="pickup" data-id="${r.id||''}">删除</button>` : '—'}</td></tr>`;
            });
            pickup.tbody.innerHTML = html;
            pickup.totalSpan.textContent = fmtNum(total, 2);
            pickup.totalQtySpan.textContent = totalQty;
            pickup.countBadge.textContent = rows.length;
            if (isAdmin) {
                pickup.tbody.querySelectorAll('button[data-type="pickup"]').forEach(b => b.addEventListener('click',
                    function() {
                        const i = parseInt(this.dataset.idx);
                        const id = this.dataset.id;
                        if (!confirm('确定删除此领料记录吗？同时将自动删除对应的退库入库记录（如有）。')) return;
                        const list = DataStore.getPickups();
                        const removed = list.splice(i, 1)[0];
                        DataStore.savePickups(list);
                        if (removed && removed.id && removed.retL > 0 && removed.retW > 0) {
                            const storages = DataStore.getStorages();
                            const filtered = storages.filter(s => s.sourceId !== removed.id);
                            if (filtered.length !== storages.length) {
                                DataStore.saveStorages(filtered);
                                console.log('已删除关联的退库入库记录');
                            }
                        }
                        renderPickupTable();
                        renderStorageTable();
                        updateAllCounts();
                        updatePickupStockSizes();
                        if (document.getElementById('page-finance').classList.contains('active')) renderFinance();
                        if (document.getElementById('page-inventory').classList.contains('active')) renderInventory();
                    }));
            }
        }

        function addPickup() {
            const mat = getPickupMaterial();
            if (!mat) { alert('请选择有效物料'); return; }
            const name = pickup.nameInput.value.trim() || mat.name;
            const spec = pickup.specInput.value.trim() || mat.spec || '';
            const project = pickup.projectSelect.value || '';
            const person = pickup.personSelect.value || '';
            const qty = parseInt(pickup.qty.value) || 1;
            const realL = parseNum(pickup.realLen.value);
            const realW = parseNum(pickup.realWid.value);
            const retL = parseNum(pickup.retLen.value);
            const retW = parseNum(pickup.retWid.value);
            const date = pickup.date.value || getToday();
            const thick = parseNum(pickup.thickness.value);
            if (qty < 1) { alert('数量至少为1！'); return; }
            if (realL <= 0 || realW <= 0) { alert('领料长度和宽度必须为正数！'); return; }
            if (retL < 0 || retW < 0) { alert('退库尺寸不能为负数！'); return; }
            if (mat.type === 'profile' && (realW !== 1000 || retW !== 1000)) { alert('型材宽度固定为1000mm'); return; }
            let singleArea, weight, unitWeight, returnWeight = 0;
            if (mat.type === 'plate') {
                const realArea = (realL * realW) / 1000000,
                    retArea = (retL * retW) / 1000000;
                singleArea = realArea - retArea;
                unitWeight = thick * mat.density;
                weight = singleArea * unitWeight * qty;
                returnWeight = retArea * unitWeight * qty;
            } else {
                const realLenM = realL / 1000,
                    retLenM = retL / 1000;
                singleArea = realLenM - retLenM;
                unitWeight = mat.perMeterWeight;
                weight = singleArea * unitWeight * qty;
                returnWeight = retLenM * unitWeight * qty;
            }
            if (singleArea < 0) { alert('耗用面积为负，退库不能大于领料'); return; }

            const id = Date.now() + '_' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 6);

            const list = DataStore.getPickups();
            const newPickup = { id, date, materialName: name, spec, project, person, qty, realL, realW, retL, retW,
                singleArea,
                weight, returnWeight, unitWeight, matCode: mat.code, type: mat.type, thickness: thick };
            list.push(newPickup);
            DataStore.savePickups(list);

            if (retL > 0 && retW > 0 && returnWeight > 0) {
                let inSingleArea, inWeight;
                if (mat.type === 'plate') {
                    const retArea = (retL * retW) / 1000000;
                    inSingleArea = retArea;
                    inWeight = retArea * unitWeight * qty;
                } else {
                    const retLenM = retL / 1000;
                    inSingleArea = retLenM;
                    inWeight = retLenM * unitWeight * qty;
                }
                const storageRecord = {
                    date: date,
                    materialName: name,
                    spec: spec,
                    qty: qty,
                    len: retL,
                    wid: retW,
                    singleArea: inSingleArea,
                    weight: inWeight,
                    unitWeight: unitWeight,
                    remark: '生产退库',
                    matCode: mat.code,
                    type: mat.type,
                    thickness: mat.type === 'plate' ? thick : '-',
                    sourceId: id
                };
                const storages = DataStore.getStorages();
                storages.push(storageRecord);
                DataStore.saveStorages(storages);
                console.log('已自动生成退库入库单');
            }

            renderPickupTable();
            renderStorageTable();
            updateAllCounts();
            pickup.realLen.value = '';
            pickup.retLen.value = '0';
            if (mat.type === 'plate') {
                pickup.realWid.value = '';
                pickup.retWid.value = '0';
                pickup.realWid.dataset.userChanged = 'false';
                pickup.retWid.dataset.userChanged = 'false';
                updatePickupStockSizes();
            } else {
                pickup.realWid.value = '1000';
                pickup.retWid.value = '1000';
            }
            pickup.qty.value = '1';
            pickup.realLen.focus();
            if (document.getElementById('page-finance').classList.contains('active')) renderFinance();
            if (document.getElementById('page-inventory').classList.contains('active')) renderInventory();
        }

        function clearPickups() {
            if (!Auth.isAdmin()) return;
            if (!DataStore.getPickups().length) return;
            if (confirm('确定清空全部领料明细吗？同时将删除所有关联的退库入库记录。')) {
                const pickups = DataStore.getPickups();
                const ids = pickups.map(p => p.id).filter(id => id);
                DataStore.savePickups([]);
                if (ids.length) {
                    const storages = DataStore.getStorages();
                    const filtered = storages.filter(s => !s.sourceId || !ids.includes(s.sourceId));
                    DataStore.saveStorages(filtered);
                }
                renderPickupTable();
                renderStorageTable();
                updateAllCounts();
                updatePickupStockSizes();
                if (document.getElementById('page-finance').classList.contains('active')) renderFinance();
                if (document.getElementById('page-inventory').classList.contains('active')) renderInventory();
            }
        }

        function printPickup() { window.print(); }

        function exportPickupExcel() {
            const rows = DataStore.getPickups();
            if (!rows.length) { alert('暂无领料数据'); return; }
            const data = rows.map(r => {
                let grossWeight = 0;
                if (r.type === 'plate') {
                    const area = (r.realL * r.realW) / 1000000;
                    grossWeight = area * r.unitWeight * r.qty;
                } else {
                    const lenM = r.realL / 1000;
                    grossWeight = lenM * r.unitWeight * r.qty;
                }
                return { ...r, grossWeight: fmtNum(grossWeight, 2), singleArea: fmtNum(r.singleArea || 0, 3),
                    weight: fmtNum(r.weight || 0, 2), returnWeight: fmtNum(r.returnWeight || 0, 2) };
            });
            exportToExcel(data, '领料明细_' + getToday(), ['领料日期', '项目', '领料人', '物料名称', '规格', '数量', '领料长(mm)',
                '领料宽(mm)', '退库长(mm)', '退库宽(mm)', '项目用料面积(㎡)', '领料重量(KG)', '项目用料重量(KG)', '产线退库重量(KG)'
            ], ['date', 'project', 'person', 'materialName', 'spec', 'qty', 'realL', 'realW', 'retL', 'retW',
                'singleArea', 'grossWeight', 'weight', 'returnWeight'
            ]);
        }

        // ================================================================
        // 入库模块
        // ================================================================
        const storage = {
            matSelect: document.getElementById('storageMaterialSelect'),
            specDisplay: document.getElementById('storageSpecDisplay'),
            thickness: document.getElementById('storageThickness'),
            thicknessUnit: document.getElementById('storageThicknessUnit'),
            weightLabel: document.getElementById('storageWeightLabel'),
            weightPerUnit: document.getElementById('storageWeightPerUnit'),
            weightUnit: document.getElementById('storageWeightUnit'),
            date: document.getElementById('storageDate'),
            nameInput: document.getElementById('storageNameInput'),
            specInput: document.getElementById('storageSpecInput'),
            qty: document.getElementById('storageQty'),
            len: document.getElementById('storageLen'),
            wid: document.getElementById('storageWid'),
            remark: document.getElementById('storageRemark'),
            remarkFilter: document.getElementById('storageRemarkFilter'),
            widthLabel: document.getElementById('storageWidthLabel'),
            widthGroup: document.getElementById('storageWidthGroup'),
            hint: document.getElementById('storageHint'),
            addBtn: document.getElementById('storageAddBtn'),
            clearBtn: document.getElementById('storageClearBtn'),
            printBtn: document.getElementById('storagePrintBtn'),
            excelBtn: document.getElementById('storageExcelBtn'),
            tbody: document.getElementById('storageTableBody'),
            totalSpan: document.getElementById('storageTotalWeight'),
            totalQtySpan: document.getElementById('storageTotalQty'),
            countBadge: document.getElementById('storageCount'),
            collapseBadge: document.getElementById('storageCollapseBadge'),
        };

        function getStorageMaterial() {
            const idx = parseInt(storage.matSelect.value, 10);
            const mats = DataStore.getMaterials();
            return mats[idx] || null;
        }

        function updateStorageParams() {
            const mat = getStorageMaterial();
            if (!mat) return;
            storage.specDisplay.textContent = mat.spec ? '[' + mat.spec + ']' : '';
            storage.nameInput.value = mat.name || '';
            storage.specInput.value = mat.spec || '';
            if (mat.type === 'plate') {
                storage.thickness.disabled = false;
                storage.thicknessUnit.textContent = '(板材用)';
                let thickVal = mat.thickness;
                if (thickVal === undefined || thickVal === null || thickVal <= 0) {
                    const extracted = extractNumberFromSpec(mat.spec);
                    if (extracted !== null && extracted > 0) thickVal = extracted;
                }
                storage.thickness.value = (thickVal !== undefined && thickVal !== null && thickVal > 0) ? thickVal : '';
                storage.weightLabel.textContent = '每㎡重量';
                storage.weightUnit.textContent = 'KG';
                storage.hint.textContent = '⚡ 板材：长×宽算面积，重量=单件面积×每㎡重量×数量';
                storage.widthLabel.textContent = '宽度 (mm)';
                storage.widthGroup.style.display = 'flex';
                storage.wid.disabled = false;
                if (storage.wid.value === '1000' && !storage.wid.dataset.userChanged) storage.wid.value = '';
            } else {
                storage.thickness.disabled = true;
                storage.thicknessUnit.textContent = '(型材禁用)';
                storage.thickness.value = '';
                storage.weightLabel.textContent = '每米重量';
                storage.weightUnit.textContent = 'KG';
                storage.hint.textContent = '⚡ 型材：宽度可空（按1米计算），长度按米计';
                storage.widthLabel.textContent = '宽度 (mm) 可空';
                storage.widthGroup.style.display = 'flex';
                storage.wid.disabled = false;
                storage.wid.placeholder = '空则按1米';
                storage.wid.value = '';
                storage.wid.dataset.userChanged = 'false';
            }
            const thick = parseNum(storage.thickness.value);
            storage.weightPerUnit.textContent = fmtNum(mat.type === 'plate' ? thick * mat.density : (mat.perMeterWeight ||
                0), 2);
            renderStorageTable();
        }

        function renderStorageTable() {
            let rows = DataStore.getStorages();
            const filterVal = storage.remarkFilter.value.trim().toLowerCase();
            if (filterVal) {
                rows = rows.filter(r => (r.remark || '').toLowerCase().includes(filterVal));
            }
            const dateVal = storage.date.value || getToday(),
                mats = DataStore.getMaterials();
            const count = rows.length;
            storage.collapseBadge.textContent = count;
            storage.collapseBadge.className = 'badge-count' + (count === 0 ? ' zero' : '');
            if (!rows.length) {
                storage.tbody.innerHTML = '<tr class="empty-row"><td colspan="12">暂无入库明细</td></tr>';
                storage.totalSpan.textContent = '0.00';
                storage.totalQtySpan.textContent = '0';
                storage.countBadge.textContent = '0';
                return;
            }
            let html = '',
                total = 0,
                totalQty = 0;
            const isAdmin = Auth.isAdmin();
            rows.forEach((r, i) => {
                total += r.weight || 0;
                totalQty += r.qty || 1;
                let thick = r.thickness !== undefined && r.thickness !== '' ? r.thickness : '';
                let unitW = r.unitWeight !== undefined && r.unitWeight !== '' ? r.unitWeight : '';
                if (thick === '' || unitW === '') {
                    const mat = mats.find(m => m.code === r.matCode);
                    if (mat) {
                        if (mat.type === 'plate') {
                            thick = mat.thickness !== undefined ? mat.thickness : '';
                            unitW = mat.density * (thick || 0);
                        } else {
                            thick = '-';
                            unitW = mat.perMeterWeight || 0;
                        }
                    }
                }
                let remarkDisplay = r.remark || '';
                if (r.sourceId) remarkDisplay += ' (退库)';
                html += `<tr>
                    <td>${r.date||dateVal}</td>
                    <td>${r.materialName||''}</td>
                    <td class="col-spec">${r.spec||''}</td>
                    <td>${thick}</td>
                    <td>${fmtNum(unitW, 2)}</td>
                    <td class="col-qty">${r.qty||1}</td>
                    <td>${r.len||0}</td>
                    <td>${r.wid||''}</td>
                    <td>${fmtNum(r.singleArea||0,3)}</td>
                    <td>${fmtNum(r.weight||0,2)}</td>
                    <td>${remarkDisplay}</td>
                    <td class="no-print">${isAdmin ? `<button class="btn btn-danger btn-sm" data-idx="${i}" data-type="storage">删除</button>` : '—'}</td>
                </tr>`;
            });
            storage.tbody.innerHTML = html;
            storage.totalSpan.textContent = fmtNum(total, 2);
            storage.totalQtySpan.textContent = totalQty;
            storage.countBadge.textContent = rows.length;
            if (isAdmin) {
                storage.tbody.querySelectorAll('button[data-type="storage"]').forEach(b => b.addEventListener('click',
                    function() {
                        const i = parseInt(this.dataset.idx),
                            l = DataStore.getStorages();
                        l.splice(i, 1);
                        DataStore.saveStorages(l);
                        renderStorageTable();
                        updateAllCounts();
                        updatePickupStockSizes();
                        if (document.getElementById('page-inventory').classList.contains('active')) renderInventory();
                    }));
            }
        }

        function addStorage() {
            const mat = getStorageMaterial();
            if (!mat) { alert('请选择有效物料'); return; }
            const name = storage.nameInput.value.trim() || mat.name;
            const spec = storage.specInput.value.trim() || mat.spec || '';
            const qty = parseInt(storage.qty.value) || 1;
            const len = parseNum(storage.len.value);
            let wid = parseNum(storage.wid.value);
            const date = storage.date.value || getToday();
            const remark = storage.remark.value.trim() || '';
            const thick = parseNum(storage.thickness.value);
            if (qty < 1) { alert('数量至少为1！'); return; }
            if (len <= 0) { alert('长度必须为正数！'); return; }
            if (mat.type === 'profile' && (isNaN(wid) || wid <= 0)) wid = 1000;
            if (wid <= 0) { alert('宽度必须为正数！'); return; }
            let singleArea, weight, unitWeight;
            if (mat.type === 'plate') {
                singleArea = (len * wid) / 1000000;
                unitWeight = thick * mat.density;
                weight = singleArea * unitWeight * qty;
            } else {
                const lenM = len / 1000;
                singleArea = lenM;
                unitWeight = mat.perMeterWeight;
                weight = singleArea * unitWeight * qty;
            }
            const list = DataStore.getStorages();
            list.push({
                date,
                materialName: name,
                spec,
                qty,
                len,
                wid,
                singleArea,
                weight,
                unitWeight,
                remark,
                matCode: mat.code,
                type: mat.type,
                thickness: mat.type === 'plate' ? thick : '-'
            });
            DataStore.saveStorages(list);
            renderStorageTable();
            updateAllCounts();
            updatePickupStockSizes();
            storage.len.value = '';
            storage.remark.value = '';
            storage.wid.value = '';
            storage.wid.dataset.userChanged = 'false';
            storage.qty.value = '1';
            storage.len.focus();
            if (document.getElementById('page-inventory').classList.contains('active')) renderInventory();
        }

        function clearStorages() {
            if (!Auth.isAdmin()) return;
            if (!DataStore.getStorages().length) return;
            if (confirm('确定清空全部入库明细吗？注意：这将同时删除所有手工入库记录，但不影响自动生成的退库入库（可通过领料单删除联动）。')) {
                const storages = DataStore.getStorages();
                const kept = storages.filter(s => s.sourceId);
                DataStore.saveStorages(kept);
                renderStorageTable();
                updateAllCounts();
                updatePickupStockSizes();
                if (document.getElementById('page-finance').classList.contains('active')) renderFinance();
                if (document.getElementById('page-inventory').classList.contains('active')) renderInventory();
            }
        }

        function printStorage() { window.print(); }

        function exportStorageExcel() {
            let rows = DataStore.getStorages();
            const filterVal = storage.remarkFilter.value.trim().toLowerCase();
            if (filterVal) {
                rows = rows.filter(r => (r.remark || '').toLowerCase().includes(filterVal));
            }
            if (!rows.length) { alert('当前筛选条件下没有数据可导出'); return; }
            const mats = DataStore.getMaterials();
            const data = rows.map(r => {
                let thick = r.thickness !== undefined && r.thickness !== '' ? r.thickness : '';
                let unitW = r.unitWeight !== undefined && r.unitWeight !== '' ? r.unitWeight : '';
                if (thick === '' || unitW === '') {
                    const mat = mats.find(m => m.code === r.matCode);
                    if (mat) {
                        if (mat.type === 'plate') {
                            thick = mat.thickness !== undefined ? mat.thickness : '';
                            unitW = mat.density * (thick || 0);
                        } else {
                            thick = '-';
                            unitW = mat.perMeterWeight || 0;
                        }
                    }
                }
                let remarkDisplay = r.remark || '';
                if (r.sourceId) remarkDisplay += ' (退库)';
                return { ...r, thickness: thick, unitWeight: fmtNum(unitW, 2), singleArea: fmtNum(r.singleArea || 0,
                        3), weight: fmtNum(r.weight || 0, 2), remarkDisplay: remarkDisplay };
            });
            exportToExcel(data, '入库明细_' + getToday(),
                ['入库日期', '物料名称', '规格', '厚度(mm)', '单位重量(KG)', '数量', '长度(mm)', '宽度(mm)', '单件面积(㎡)', '总重量(KG)',
                    '备注'
                ],
                ['date', 'materialName', 'spec', 'thickness', 'unitWeight', 'qty', 'len', 'wid', 'singleArea',
                    'weight', 'remarkDisplay'
                ]
            );
        }

        // ================================================================
        // 详情模块
        // ================================================================
        const detail = {

            toDate: document.getElementById('detailToDate'),

            personFilter: document.getElementById('detailPersonFilter'),
            typeFilter: document.getElementById('detailTypeFilter'),
            refreshBtn: document.getElementById('detailRefreshBtn'),
            excelBtn: document.getElementById('detailExcelBtn'),
            printBtn: document.getElementById('detailPrintBtn'),
            tbody: document.getElementById('detailTableBody'),
            totalPickup: document.getElementById('detailTotalPickup'),
            totalStorage: document.getElementById('detailTotalStorage'),
            totalRows: document.getElementById('detailTotalRows'),
            dateRange: document.getElementById('detailDateRange'),
            collapseBadge: document.getElementById('detailCollapseBadge'),
        };

        function renderDetail() {
            const pickups = DataStore.getPickups(),
                storages = DataStore.getStorages();
            const from = detail.fromDate.value,
                to = detail.toDate.value,
                proj = detail.projectFilter.value,
                person = detail.personFilter.value,
                type = detail.typeFilter.value;
            let all = [];
            pickups.forEach(r => {
                if (from && r.date < from) return;
                if (to && r.date > to) return;
                if (proj !== '__ALL__' && r.project !== proj) return;
                if (person !== '__ALL__' && r.person !== person) return;
                if (type !== '__ALL__' && type !== 'pickup') return;
                all.push({ ...r, _type: '领料', _typeClass: 'type-pickup', len: r.realL || 0, wid: r.realW || 0,
                    area: r.singleArea || 0, weight: r.weight || 0, remark: '' });
            });
            storages.forEach(r => {
                if (from && r.date < from) return;
                if (to && r.date > to) return;
                if (proj !== '__ALL__') return;
                if (person !== '__ALL__') return;
                if (type !== '__ALL__' && type !== 'storage') return;
                all.push({ ...r, _type: '入库', _typeClass: 'type-storage', project: '', person: '', len: r
                        .len || 0, wid: r.wid || 0, area: r.singleArea || 0, weight: r.weight || 0 });
            });
            all.sort((a, b) => (a.date || '').localeCompare(b.date || ''));
            let totalPickup = 0,
                totalStorage = 0;
            all.forEach(r => { if (r._type === '领料') totalPickup += r.weight;
                else totalStorage += r.weight; });
            detail.totalPickup.textContent = fmtNum(totalPickup, 2);
            detail.totalStorage.textContent = fmtNum(totalStorage, 2);
            detail.totalRows.textContent = all.length;
            detail.dateRange.textContent = (from && to) ? from + ' 至 ' + to : (from ? '从 ' + from + ' 起' : (to ? '至 ' +
                to + ' 止' : '全部'));
            detail.collapseBadge.textContent = all.length;
            detail.collapseBadge.className = 'badge-count' + (all.length === 0 ? ' zero' : '');
            if (!all.length) { detail.tbody.innerHTML = '<tr class="empty-row"><td colspan="13">暂无记录</td></tr>'; return; }
            let html = '';
            const isAdmin = Auth.isAdmin();
            all.forEach((r, i) => {
                html += `<tr><td>${r.date||''}</td><td class="${r._typeClass}">${r._type}</td><td>${r.project||''}</td><td>${r.person||''}</td>
                    <td>${r.materialName||''}</td><td class="col-spec">${r.spec||''}</td><td class="col-qty">${r.qty||1}</td>
                    <td>${r.len||0}</td><td>${r.wid||''}</td><td>${fmtNum(r.area||0,3)}</td><td>${fmtNum(r.weight||0,2)}</td>
                    <td>${r.remark||''}</td><td class="no-print">${isAdmin ? `<button class="btn btn-danger btn-sm" data-idx="${i}" data-type="detail">删除</button>` : '—'}</td></tr>`;
            });
            detail.tbody.innerHTML = html;
            if (isAdmin) {
                detail.tbody.querySelectorAll('button[data-type="detail"]').forEach(b => b.addEventListener('click',
                    function() {
                        const i = parseInt(this.dataset.idx);
                        const item = all[i];
                        if (!item) return;
                        if (!confirm('确定删除此条' + item._type + '记录吗？')) return;
                        if (item._type === '领料') {

                                .materialName && r.spec === item.spec && r.qty === item.qty && r

                                .retL && r.retW === item.retW && r.project === item.project && r
                                .person === item.person);
                            if (idx !== -1) { list.splice(idx, 1);
                                DataStore.savePickups(list); } else { alert('未找到对应记录'); return; }
                        } else {
                            const list = DataStore.getStorages();
                            const idx = list.findIndex(r => r.date === item.date && r.materialName === item
                                .materialName && r.spec === item.spec && r.qty === item.qty && r
                                .len === item.len && r.wid === item.wid && r.remark === item.remark);
                            if (idx !== -1) { list.splice(idx, 1);
                                DataStore.saveStorages(list); } else { alert('未找到对应记录'); return; }
                        }
                        renderPickupTable();
                        renderStorageTable();
                        renderDetail();
                        updateAllCounts();
                        updatePickupStockSizes();
                        if (document.getElementById('page-inventory').classList.contains('active')) renderInventory();

            });

        // ================================================================
        // 财务统计模块 - 增加出库和结存
        // ================================================================
        const finance = {
            fromDate: document.getElementById('financeFromDate'),
            toDate: document.getElementById('financeToDate'),
            refreshBtn: document.getElementById('financeRefreshBtn'),
            excelBtn: document.getElementById('financeExcelBtn'),
            printBtn: document.getElementById('financePrintBtn'),
            tbody: document.getElementById('financeTableBody'),
            totalBefore: document.getElementById('financeTotalBefore'),
            totalIn: document.getElementById('financeTotalIn'),
            totalOut: document.getElementById('financeTotalOut'),
            totalBalance: document.getElementById('financeTotalBalance'),
            dateRange: document.getElementById('financeDateRange'),
            collapseBadge: document.getElementById('financeCollapseBadge'),
        };

        function renderFinance() {
            const pickups = DataStore.getPickups();
            const storages = DataStore.getStorages();
            const mats = DataStore.getMaterials();
            const from = finance.fromDate.value;
            const to = finance.toDate.value;

            // 期间筛选
            let fp = pickups.slice();
            let fs = storages.slice();
            if (from) { fp = fp.filter(r => r.date >= from);
                fs = fs.filter(r => r.date >= from); }
            if (to) { fp = fp.filter(r => r.date <= to);
                fs = fs.filter(r => r.date <= to); }

            const beforeFrom = from || '1970-01-01';
            const beforePickups = pickups.filter(r => r.date < beforeFrom);
            const beforeStorages = storages.filter(r => r.date < beforeFrom);

            // 收集所有物料编码
            const allCodes = new Set();
            pickups.forEach(r => { if (r.matCode) allCodes.add(r.matCode); });
            storages.forEach(r => { if (r.matCode) allCodes.add(r.matCode); });

            const groups = new Map();
            allCodes.forEach(code => {
                const mat = mats.find(m => m.code === code);
                groups.set(code, {
                    matCode: code,
                    name: mat ? mat.name : '',
                    spec: mat ? mat.spec : '',
                    type: mat ? mat.type : '',
                    beforeStorage: 0,
                    beforePickup: 0,
                    storage: 0,
                    pickup: 0,
                });
            });

            if (groups.size === 0) {
                finance.tbody.innerHTML = '<tr class="empty-row"><td colspan="8">暂无数据</td></tr>';
                finance.totalBefore.textContent = '0.00';
                finance.totalIn.textContent = '0.00';
                finance.totalOut.textContent = '0.00';
                finance.totalBalance.textContent = '0.00';
                finance.dateRange.textContent = (from && to) ? from + ' 至 ' + to : (from ? '从 ' + from + ' 起' : (to ?
                    '至 ' + to + ' 止' : '全部'));
                finance.collapseBadge.textContent = '0';
                finance.collapseBadge.className = 'badge-count zero';
                return;
            }

            // 期初计算
            beforeStorages.forEach(s => {
                if (groups.has(s.matCode)) {
                    const g = groups.get(s.matCode);
                    g.beforeStorage += (s.weight || 0);
                }
            });
            beforePickups.forEach(p => {
                if (groups.has(p.matCode)) {
                    const g = groups.get(p.matCode);
                    const net = (p.weight || 0); // 项目用料重量
                    g.beforePickup += net;
                }
            });

            // 期间入库
            fs.forEach(s => {
                if (groups.has(s.matCode)) {
                    const g = groups.get(s.matCode);
                    g.storage += (s.weight || 0);
                }
            });

            // 期间出库（项目用料重量）
            fp.forEach(p => {
                if (groups.has(p.matCode)) {
                    const g = groups.get(p.matCode);
                    g.pickup += (p.weight || 0);
                }
            });

            const result = [];
            let totalBefore = 0,
                totalIn = 0,
                totalOut = 0,
                totalBalance = 0;
            groups.forEach((g, code) => {
                if (!g.name) {
                    const mat = mats.find(m => m.code === code);
                    if (mat) { g.name = mat.name;
                        g.spec = mat.spec;
                        g.type = mat.type; }
                }
                const before = g.beforeStorage - g.beforePickup;
                const inW = g.storage;
                const outW = g.pickup;
                const balance = before + inW - outW;
                result.push({
                    matCode: code,
                    name: g.name || code,
                    spec: g.spec || '-',
                    type: g.type || '未知',
                    before: before,
                    inWeight: inW,
                    outWeight: outW,
                    balance: balance,
                });
                totalBefore += before;
                totalIn += inW;
                totalOut += outW;
                totalBalance += balance;
            });

            result.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name) || a.spec.localeCompare(b.spec));

            finance.totalBefore.textContent = fmtNum(totalBefore, 2);
            finance.totalIn.textContent = fmtNum(totalIn, 2);
            finance.totalOut.textContent = fmtNum(totalOut, 2);
            finance.totalBalance.textContent = fmtNum(totalBalance, 2);
            finance.dateRange.textContent = (from && to) ? from + ' 至 ' + to : (from ? '从 ' + from + ' 起' : (to ?
                '至 ' + to + ' 止' : '全部'));
            finance.collapseBadge.textContent = result.length;
            finance.collapseBadge.className = 'badge-count' + (result.length === 0 ? ' zero' : '');

            if (!result.length) {
                finance.tbody.innerHTML = '<tr class="empty-row"><td colspan="8">暂无数据</td></tr>';
                return;
            }

            let html = '';
            result.forEach(r => {
                const typeLabel = r.type === 'plate' ? '板材' : (r.type === 'profile' ? '型材' : '未知');
                const balanceColor = r.balance < -0.001 ? 'color:var(--danger);' : 'color:var(--primary);';
                html += `<tr>
                    <td><code style="font-size:11px;background:var(--gray-100);padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;">${r.matCode}</code></td>
                    <td><strong>${r.name}</strong></td>
                    <td class="col-spec">${r.spec}</td>
                    <td>${typeLabel}</td>
                    <td style="font-weight:600;">${fmtNum(r.before,2)}</td>
                    <td style="font-weight:600;color:var(--success);">${fmtNum(r.inWeight,2)}</td>

        function exportFinanceExcel() {
            const pickups = DataStore.getPickups();
            const storages = DataStore.getStorages();
            const mats = DataStore.getMaterials();
            const from = finance.fromDate.value;
            const to = finance.toDate.value;

            let fp = pickups.slice(),
                fs = storages.slice();
            if (from) { fp = fp.filter(r => r.date >= from);
                fs = fs.filter(r => r.date >= from); }
            if (to) { fp = fp.filter(r => r.date <= to);
                fs = fs.filter(r => r.date <= to); }

            const beforeFrom = from || '1970-01-01';
            const beforePickups = pickups.filter(r => r.date < beforeFrom);
            const beforeStorages = storages.filter(r => r.date < beforeFrom);

            const allCodes = new Set();
            pickups.forEach(r => { if (r.matCode) allCodes.add(r.matCode); });
            storages.forEach(r => { if (r.matCode) allCodes.add(r.matCode); });

            const groups = new Map();
            allCodes.forEach(code => {
                const mat = mats.find(m => m.code === code);
                groups.set(code, {
                    matCode: code,
                    name: mat ? mat.name : '',
                    spec: mat ? mat.spec : '',
                    type: mat ? mat.type : '',
                    beforeStorage: 0,
                    beforePickup: 0,
                    storage: 0,
                    pickup: 0,
                });
            });

            beforeStorages.forEach(s => { if (groups.has(s.matCode)) { const g = groups.get(s.matCode);
                    g.beforeStorage += (s.weight || 0); } });
            beforePickups.forEach(p => { if (groups.has(p.matCode)) { const g = groups.get(p.matCode);
                    g.beforePickup += (p.weight || 0); } });
            fs.forEach(s => { if (groups.has(s.matCode)) { const g = groups.get(s.matCode);
                    g.storage += (s.weight || 0); } });
            fp.forEach(p => { if (groups.has(p.matCode)) { const g = groups.get(p.matCode);
                    g.pickup += (p.weight || 0); } });

            const result = [];
            groups.forEach((g, code) => {
                if (!g.name) { const mat = mats.find(m => m.code === code); if (mat) { g.name = mat.name;
                        g.spec = mat.spec;
                        g.type = mat.type; } }
                const before = g.beforeStorage - g.beforePickup;
                const inW = g.storage;
                const outW = g.pickup;
                result.push({
                    matCode: code,
                    name: g.name || code,
                    spec: g.spec || '-',
                    type: g.type === 'plate' ? '板材' : (g.type === 'profile' ? '型材' : '未知'),
                    before: fmtNum(before, 2),
                    inWeight: fmtNum(inW, 2),
                    outWeight: fmtNum(outW, 2),
                    balance: fmtNum(before + inW - outW, 2),
                });
            });
            result.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name) || a.spec.localeCompare(b.spec));

            if (!result.length) { alert('当前筛选条件下没有数据可导出'); return; }
            exportToExcel(result, '财务统计_' + getToday(),
                ['物料编码', '物料名称', '规格', '类型', '期初(KG)', '入库(KG)', '出库(KG)', '结存(KG)'],
                ['matCode', 'name', 'spec', 'type', 'before', 'inWeight', 'outWeight', 'balance']);
        }

                let len = s.len || 0;
                let wid = s.wid || 0;

                    });
                }
                const entry = map.get(key);
                entry.totalInWeight += (s.weight || 0);
                entry.totalInQty += (s.qty || 0);
            });

            pickups.forEach(p => {
                const mat = mats.find(m => m.code === p.matCode);
                if (!mat) return;
                let len = p.realL || 0;
                let wid = p.realW || 0;
                if (mat.type === 'profile' && wid === 0) wid = 1000;
                const key = p.matCode + '|' + len + '|' + wid;

                        len: len,

                        totalOutWeight: 0,
                        totalInQty: 0,

                    });
                }

                const grossWeight = (p.weight || 0) + (p.returnWeight || 0);
                entry.totalOutWeight += grossWeight;
                entry.totalOutQty += (p.qty || 0);
            });

            const result = [];
            let totalWeight = 0,
                totalQty = 0;
            map.forEach((entry, key) => {
                const stockWeight = entry.totalInWeight - entry.totalOutWeight;
                const stockQty = entry.totalInQty - entry.totalOutQty;
                if (stockWeight > 0.001 || stockQty > 0.001) {
                    result.push({
                        matCode: entry.matCode,
                        name: entry.name,
                        spec: entry.spec,
                        type: entry.type === 'plate' ? '板材' : '型材',

                        stockWeight: stockWeight,

            });

        }

        function addNewMaterial() {
            if (!Auth.isAdmin()) return;
            const code = newMat.code.value.trim(),
                name = newMat.name.value.trim(),
                spec = newMat.spec.value.trim(),
                type = newMat.type.value;
            const density = parseNum(newMat.density.value),
                perMeter = parseNum(newMat.perMeter.value);
            if (!code || !name || !spec) { alert('请填写完整的物料代码、名称和规格！'); return; }
            const mats = DataStore.getMaterials();
            if (mats.some(m => m.code === code)) { alert('物料代码 "' + code + '" 已存在！'); return; }
            let newItem;
            if (type === 'plate') {
                if (density <= 0) { alert('密度必须大于0'); return; }
                let thickness = extractNumberFromSpec(spec);
                if (thickness === null || thickness <= 0) {
                    const input = prompt('无法从规格中自动提取厚度，请手动输入厚度 (mm)：', '');
                    if (input === null) return;
                    thickness = parseFloat(input);
                    if (isNaN(thickness) || thickness <= 0) { alert('厚度必须为正数'); return; }
                }
                newItem = { code, name, spec, type, density, thickness };
            } else {
                if (perMeter <= 0) { alert('每米重量必须大于0'); return; }
                newItem = { code, name, spec, type, perMeterWeight: perMeter };
            }
            mats.push(newItem);
            DataStore.saveMaterials(mats);
            renderMaterialList();
            populateAllSelects();
            updatePickupParams();
            updateStorageParams();
            updateDataCenterStatus();
            if (document.getElementById('page-inventory').classList.contains('active')) renderInventory();
            newMat.code.value = '';
            newMat.name.value = '';
            newMat.spec.value = '';
            newMat.density.value = '7.85';
            newMat.perMeter.value = '5.00';
            newMat.code.focus();
            alert('✅ 物料 "' + name + ' ' + spec + '" 添加成功！');
        }

        function handleExport() {
            try {
                const data = DataStore.exportAll();
                const json = JSON.stringify(data, null, 2);
                const blob = new Blob([json], { type: 'application/json' });
                const a = document.createElement('a');
                a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
                a.download = '钢材管理_备份_' + getToday() + '.json';
                document.body.appendChild(a);
                a.click();
                document.body.removeChild(a);
                DataStore.setLastBackup(new Date().toISOString());
                updateDataCenterStatus();
                showDCMessage('✅ 数据导出成功！', 'success');
            } catch (e) { showDCMessage('❌ 导出失败：' + e.message, 'error'); }
        }

        function handleImportClick() { dc.fileInput.click(); }

        function handleFileChange(e) {
            const file = e.target.files[0];
            if (!file) { dc.importArea.classList.remove('show'); return; }
            dc.fileName.textContent = file.name;
            dc.importArea.classList.add('show');
            pendingImportData = null;
            const reader = new FileReader();
            reader.onload = function(ev) {
                try {
                    const json = JSON.parse(ev.target.result);
                    if (!json.materials || !json.pickups || !json.storages || !json.projects || !json.persons) throw new Error(
                        '数据格式不完整');
                    pendingImportData = json;
                    showDCMessage('📄 文件 "' + file.name + '" 读取成功，点击确认导入将完全替换当前数据。', 'info');
                } catch (err) { showDCMessage('❌ 文件解析失败：' + err.message, 'error');
                    dc.importArea.classList.remove('show');
                    dc.fileInput.value = '';
                    pendingImportData = null; }
            };
            reader.readAsText(file);
        }

        function confirmImport() {
            if (!pendingImportData) { showDCMessage('⚠️ 请先选择有效的备份文件', 'error'); return; }
            if (!confirm('⚠️ 导入将完全替换当前所有数据，确定继续吗？')) return;
            try {
                DataStore.importAll(pendingImportData);
                populateAllSelects();
                updatePickupParams();
                updateStorageParams();
                renderPickupTable();
                renderStorageTable();
                renderMaterialList();
                renderDetail();
                renderFinance();
                renderInventory();
                renderProjects();
                renderPersons();
                updateAllCounts();
                updateDataCenterStatus();
                dc.importArea.classList.remove('show');
                dc.fileInput.value = '';
                pendingImportData = null;
                showDCMessage('✅ 数据导入成功！', 'success');
            } catch (e) { showDCMessage('❌ 导入失败：' + e.message, 'error'); }
        }

        function cancelImport() {
            dc.importArea.classList.remove('show');
            dc.fileInput.value = '';
            pendingImportData = null;
            showDCMessage('已取消导入', 'info');
        }

        function handleClearRecords() {
            if (!Auth.isAdmin()) return;
            const p = DataStore.getPickups().length,
                s = DataStore.getStorages().length;
            if (p === 0 && s === 0) { showDCMessage('📭 当前没有单据需要清空', 'info'); return; }
            if (!confirm('确定清空所有领料（' + p + '条）和入库（' + s + '条）记录吗？')) return;
            DataStore.clearRecords();
            renderPickupTable();
            renderStorageTable();
            renderDetail();
            renderFinance();
            renderInventory();
            updateAllCounts();
            updateDataCenterStatus();
            updatePickupStockSizes();
            showDCMessage('🗑️ 已清空所有领料和入库单据', 'success');
        }

        function handleResetAll() {
            if (!Auth.isAdmin()) return;
            if (!confirm('⚠️ 恢复出厂设置将删除所有自定义数据，确定继续吗？')) return;
            if (!confirm('⚠️ 再次确认：此操作不可撤销！')) return;
            DataStore.resetToDefault();
            populateAllSelects();
            updatePickupParams();
            updateStorageParams();
            renderPickupTable();
            renderStorageTable();
            renderMaterialList();
            renderDetail();
            renderFinance();
            renderInventory();
            renderProjects();
            renderPersons();
            updateAllCounts();
            updateDataCenterStatus();
            updatePickupStockSizes();
            showDCMessage('🔄 已恢复出厂设置', 'success');
        }

        // ================================================================
        // 辅助填充和事件绑定
        // ================================================================
        function populateSelect(sel, selectedCode) {
            const mats = DataStore.getMaterials();
            sel.innerHTML = '';
            mats.forEach((m, i) => { const o = document.createElement('option');
                o.value = i;
                o.textContent = m.code + ' ' + m.name + ' ' + m.spec;
                sel.appendChild(o); });
            if (selectedCode !== undefined) { const idx = mats.findIndex(m => m.code === selectedCode); if (idx >= 0) sel
                    .value = idx; }
        }

        function populateAllSelects() {
            const mats = DataStore.getMaterials();
            const pIdx = parseInt(pickup.matSelect.value, 10);
            populateSelect(pickup.matSelect);
            if (pIdx < mats.length) pickup.matSelect.value = pIdx;
            const sIdx = parseInt(storage.matSelect.value, 10);
            populateSelect(storage.matSelect);
            if (sIdx < mats.length) storage.matSelect.value = sIdx;
            populatePickupOptions();
            populateDetailFilters();
        }

        function populatePickupOptions() {
            populateSelectOptions(document.getElementById('pickupProject'), DataStore.getProjects(), '-- 选择 --');
            populateSelectOptions(document.getElementById('pickupPerson'), DataStore.getPersons(), '-- 选择 --');
        }

        function populateSelectOptions(sel, items, placeholder) {
            const cur = sel.value;
            sel.innerHTML = '';
            if (placeholder) { const o = document.createElement('option');
                o.value = '';
                o.textContent = placeholder;
                sel.appendChild(o); }
            items.forEach(i => { const o = document.createElement('option');
                o.value = i;
                o.textContent = i;
                sel.appendChild(o); });
            if (cur && items.includes(cur)) sel.value = cur;
        }

        function populateDetailFilters() {
            const projs = DataStore.getProjects(),
                persons = DataStore.getPersons();
            const ps = document.getElementById('detailProjectFilter'),
                pe = document.getElementById('detailPersonFilter');
            const cp = ps.value,
                ce = pe.value;
            ps.innerHTML = '<option value="__ALL__">全部项目</option>';
            projs.forEach(p => { const o = document.createElement('option');
                o.value = p;
                o.textContent = p;
                ps.appendChild(o); });
            if (cp && projs.includes(cp)) ps.value = cp;
            pe.innerHTML = '<option value="__ALL__">全部人员</option>';
            persons.forEach(p => { const o = document.createElement('option');
                o.value = p;
                o.textContent = p;
                pe.appendChild(o); });
            if (ce && persons.includes(ce)) pe.value = ce;
        }

        function updateAllCounts() {
            document.getElementById('pickupCount').textContent = DataStore.getPickups().length;
            document.getElementById('storageCount').textContent = DataStore.getStorages().length;
        }

        // ================================================================
        // 应用初始化与登录
        // ================================================================
        function initAppAfterLogin() {
            DataStore.fixMaterialThickness();
            DataStore.fixInitialStorageDate();
            DataStore.initDefaultStorages();

            const today = getToday();
            pickup.date.value = today;
            storage.date.value = today;
            detail.fromDate.value = '';
            detail.toDate.value = '';
            finance.fromDate.value = '';
            finance.toDate.value = '';

            populateAllSelects();
            updatePickupParams();
            updateStorageParams();
            renderPickupTable();
            renderStorageTable();
            renderMaterialList();
            renderDetail();
            renderFinance();
            renderInventory();
            renderProjects();
            renderPersons();
            updateAllCounts();
            updateDataCenterStatus();
            applyUIPermissions();

            pickup.matSelect.addEventListener('change', function() { updatePickupParams();
                updatePickupStockSizes(); });
            storage.matSelect.addEventListener('change', function() { updateStorageParams(); });
            storage.remarkFilter.addEventListener('input', function() { renderStorageTable(); });
            pickup.stockSize.addEventListener('change', function() { if (this.value) { const p = this.value.split(
                    '|');
                    pickup.realLen.value = p[0];
                    pickup.realWid.value = p[1]; } });
            pickup.addBtn.addEventListener('click', addPickup);
            pickup.clearBtn.addEventListener('click', clearPickups);
            pickup.printBtn.addEventListener('click', printPickup);
            pickup.excelBtn.addEventListener('click', exportPickupExcel);
            storage.addBtn.addEventListener('click', addStorage);
            storage.clearBtn.addEventListener('click', clearStorages);
            storage.printBtn.addEventListener('click', printStorage);
            storage.excelBtn.addEventListener('click', exportStorageExcel);
            detail.refreshBtn.addEventListener('click', renderDetail);
            detail.printBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { window.print(); });
            detail.excelBtn.addEventListener('click', exportDetailExcel);
            finance.refreshBtn.addEventListener('click', renderFinance);
            finance.printBtn.addEventListener('click', printFinance);
            finance.excelBtn.addEventListener('click', exportFinanceExcel);
            inventory.refreshBtn.addEventListener('click', renderInventory);
            inventory.excelBtn.addEventListener('click', exportInventoryExcel);
            document.getElementById('addProjectBtn').addEventListener('click', addProject);
            document.getElementById('addPersonBtn').addEventListener('click', addPerson);
            newMat.submitBtn.addEventListener('click', addNewMaterial);
            document.getElementById('addUserBtn').addEventListener('click', addUser);
            dc.exportBtn.addEventListener('click', handleExport);
            dc.importBtn.addEventListener('click', handleImportClick);
            dc.fileInput.addEventListener('change', handleFileChange);
            dc.confirmImport.addEventListener('click', confirmImport);
            dc.cancelImport.addEventListener('click', cancelImport);
            dc.clearRecordsBtn.addEventListener('click', handleClearRecords);
            dc.resetAllBtn.addEventListener('click', handleResetAll);
            document.querySelectorAll('.nav-tab').forEach(tab => tab.addEventListener('click', function() { if (this
                    .dataset.page) switchPage(this.dataset.page); }));

            console.log('✅ 钢材管理系统 V8.2 已启动 (财务出库+结存, 库存导出Excel)');
        }

        function applyUIPermissions() {
            const isAdmin = Auth.isAdmin();
            document.querySelectorAll('.nav-tab.admin-only').forEach(el => {
                if (isAdmin) el.classList.remove('hidden-tab');
                else { el.classList.add('hidden-tab'); if (el.classList.contains('active')) switchPage(
                        'page-pickup'); }
            });
            document.querySelectorAll('.admin-only').forEach(el => { if (isAdmin) el.style.display = '';
                else el.style.display = 'none'; });
            const user = Auth.getCurrentUser();
            if (user) {
                document.getElementById('headerUsername').textContent = user.username;
                const tag = document.getElementById('headerRoleTag');
                tag.textContent = user.role === 'admin' ? '管理员' : '员工';
                tag.className = 'role-tag ' + user.role;
            }
        }

        function switchPage(pageId) {
            const adminPages = ['page-projects', 'page-persons', 'page-add-material', 'page-datacenter'];
            if (adminPages.includes(pageId) && !Auth.isAdmin()) return;
            document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
            const target = document.getElementById(pageId);
            if (target) target.classList.add('active');
            document.querySelectorAll('.nav-tab').forEach(tab => tab.classList.toggle('active', tab.dataset.page ===
                pageId));
            if (pageId === 'page-detail') renderDetail();
            if (pageId === 'page-finance') renderFinance();
            if (pageId === 'page-inventory') renderInventory();
            if (pageId === 'page-projects') renderProjects();
            if (pageId === 'page-persons') renderPersons();
            if (pageId === 'page-add-material') renderMaterialList();
            if (pageId === 'page-datacenter') { updateDataCenterStatus();
                renderUserList(); }
            if (pageId === 'page-pickup') { populatePickupOptions();
                renderPickupTable();
                updatePickupStockSizes(); }
            if (pageId === 'page-storage') { renderStorageTable(); }
        }

        // ===== 登录 =====
        document.getElementById('loginBtn').addEventListener('click', function() {
            const username = document.getElementById('loginUsername').value.trim();
            const password = document.getElementById('loginPassword').value.trim();
            const errorEl = document.getElementById('loginError');
            if (!username || !password) { errorEl.textContent = '⚠️ 请输入用户名和密码'; return; }
            const user = Auth.login(username, password);
            if (user) {
                errorEl.textContent = '';
                document.getElementById('loginOverlay').classList.add('hidden');
                document.getElementById('app').style.display = 'block';
                initAppAfterLogin();
            } else {
                errorEl.textContent = '❌ 用户名或密码错误';
            }
        });
        document.getElementById('logoutBtn').addEventListener('click', function() {
            if (confirm('确定要登出吗？')) {
                Auth.logout();
                document.getElementById('loginOverlay').classList.remove('hidden');
                document.getElementById('app').style.display = 'none';
            }
        });

        // 自动登录
        (function() {
            const session = Auth.getSession();
            if (session) {
                const users = Auth.getUsers();
                const valid = users.find(u => u.username === session.username && u.role === session.role);
                if (valid) {
                    document.getElementById('loginOverlay').classList.add('hidden');
                    document.getElementById('app').style.display = 'block';
                    initAppAfterLogin();
                    return;
                } else { Auth.logout(); }
            }
            document.getElementById('loginOverlay').classList.remove('hidden');
            document.getElementById('app').style.display = 'none';
        })();
    </script>
</body>
</html>
